collectionParameter.name: java.lang.Stringalgorithm
collectionParameter.comment: java.lang.Stringthe algorithm that should be used for numerical optimization

simpleParameter.name: java.lang.Stringlimited memory quasi newton (B., F., G., S.; n=3)
java.lang.Stringlimited memory quasi newton (B., F., G., S.; n=4)
java.lang.Stringlimited memory quasi newton (B., F., G., S.; n=5)
java.lang.Stringlimited memory quasi newton (B., F., G., S.; n=6)
java.lang.Stringlimited memory quasi newton (B., F., G., S.; n=7)
java.lang.Stringlimited memory quasi newton (B., F., G., S.; n=8)
java.lang.Stringlimited memory quasi newton (B., F., G., S.; n=9)
java.lang.Stringlimited memory quasi newton (B., F., G., S.; n=10)

collectionParameter.name: java.lang.Stringtermination condition
collectionParameter.comment: java.lang.Stringthe terminantion condition for stopping the training algorithm

simpleParameter.name: java.lang.Stringepsilon
simpleParameter.comment: java.lang.Stringthe epsilon for the difference of function evaluations used for deciding whether to stop the algorithm or not

simpleParameter.name: java.lang.Stringline epsilon
simpleParameter.comment: java.lang.Stringthe threshold for stopping the line search in the numerical training

simpleParameter.name: java.lang.Stringstart distance
simpleParameter.comment: java.lang.Stringthe start distance for the line search in the numerical training

simpleParameter.name: java.lang.Stringfree parameters
simpleParameter.comment: java.lang.StringIndicates whether only the free parameters or all parameters should be used.

collectionParameter.name: java.lang.StringKindOfParameter
collectionParameter.comment: java.lang.StringIndicates whether special plugIn parameters or the zero vector should be used as start parameters. For non-concave problems it is highly recommended to use plugIn parameters.

simpleParameter.name: java.lang.StringNormalize
simpleParameter.comment: java.lang.StringIf true the conditional likelihood will be normalized to the number of data sets.

simpleParameter.name: java.lang.StringThreads
simpleParameter.comment: java.lang.StringThe number of threads that is used during an optimization.

collectionParameter.name: java.lang.StringAlphabet
collectionParameter.comment: java.lang.StringThe alphabet the model works on

simpleParameter.name: java.lang.StringValues of the alphabet
simpleParameter.comment: java.lang.StringThe possible values of the discrete alphabet.If the alphabet consists of single characters, e.g. A, C, G, and T, the values may be set as a single string, e.g. "ACGT".If the alphabet consists of multi-character symbols, e.g. Gly, Asp, Ser,the symbols must be separated by spaces.

simpleParameter.name: java.lang.StringValues of the index for computings the reverse complement
java.lang.StringLength
simpleParameter.comment: java.lang.StringThe length of sequences the model can work on
